ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job class */,
  "class_code" TEXT /* Class code assigned to the job class */,
  "class_title" TEXT /* Title of the job class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job class, including responsibilities and duties */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary department responsible for the job class */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the job class was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the job class was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the job class */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the job class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_classes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nature_of_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Abolishment, Change in class specification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the action type was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the action type was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the action type */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the action type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary range */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job class the salary range is associated with */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job class */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary range becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the salary range expires */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the salary range was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the salary range was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the salary range */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the salary range */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the salary range is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_ranges_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES job_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action log entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job class the action is associated with */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action type */,
  "actionDate" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the approving authority */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the action was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the action */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the action becomes effective */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the action was logged */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the action was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who logged the action */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES nature_of_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES job_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the department was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the department */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_class_departments" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job class */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_class_departments_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_class_departments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES job_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, department head, HR personnel) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "action_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action log entry */,
  "actionDate" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the approving authority */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the action was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the action */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the history entry was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_history_action_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_log_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., job classification trends, salary distributions) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
